logger.message: #['[CDC-Account] Evento recebido: ' ++ payload.ChangeEventHeader.changeType ++ ' - IDs: ' ++ payload.ChangeEventHeader.recordIds joinBy ', ']

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Industry, Type, BillingCity, BillingState, AnnualRevenue, Legacy_CRM_Id__c FROM Account WHERE Id = '#[vars.sfAccountId]'

db:select.db:sql: SELECT CRM_ID FROM ALGAR_CRM_NATIVE.ACCOUNTS WHERE SF_ID = :sfId

db:update.db:sql: UPDATE ALGAR_CRM_NATIVE.ACCOUNTS SET NAME = :name, INDUSTRY = :industry, TYPE = :accType, CITY = :city, STATE = :state, ANNUAL_REVENUE = :revenue, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INGESTED_TO_LAKE = FALSE WHERE SF_ID = :sfId
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ name: vars.account.Name, industry: vars.account.Industry, accType: vars.account.Type, city: vars.account.BillingCity, state: vars.account.BillingState, revenue: vars.account.AnnualRevenue default 0, sfId: vars.sfAccountId }]

db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO ALGAR_CRM_NATIVE.ACCOUNTS (CRM_ID, NAME, CNPJ, INDUSTRY, TYPE, CITY, STATE, ANNUAL_REVENUE, SEGMENT, SF_ID, SOURCE_SYSTEM, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, INGESTED_TO_LAKE) VALUES (:crmId, :name, '', :industry, :accType, :city, :state, :revenue, :segment, :sfId, 'Salesforce', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), FALSE)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ crmId: vars.crmId, name: vars.account.Name, industry: vars.account.Industry, accType: vars.account.Type, city: vars.account.BillingCity, state: vars.account.BillingState, revenue: vars.account.AnnualRevenue default 0, segment: if (vars.account.Type == 'Enterprise') 'Large' else 'Medium', sfId: vars.sfAccountId }]

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Company, Title, Status, Rating FROM Lead WHERE Id = '#[vars.sfLeadId]'

db:select.db:sql: SELECT SF_ID FROM CRM_LEADS WHERE SF_ID = :sfId

db:update.db:sql: UPDATE CRM_LEADS SET FIRST_NAME = :firstName, LAST_NAME = :lastName, EMAIL = :email, PHONE = :phone, COMPANY = :company, TITLE = :title, STATUS = :status, RATING = :rating, LAST_SYNC = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE SF_ID = :sfId
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ firstName: vars.lead.FirstName, lastName: vars.lead.LastName, email: vars.lead.Email, phone: vars.lead.Phone, company: vars.lead.Company, title: vars.lead.Title, status: vars.lead.Status, rating: vars.lead.Rating, sfId: vars.sfLeadId }]

db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO CRM_LEADS (SF_ID, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, EMAIL, PHONE, COMPANY, TITLE, STATUS, RATING, LAST_SYNC) VALUES (:sfId, :firstName, :lastName, :email, :phone, :company, :title, :status, :rating, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ sfId: vars.sfLeadId, firstName: vars.lead.FirstName, lastName: vars.lead.LastName, email: vars.lead.Email, phone: vars.lead.Phone, company: vars.lead.Company, title: vars.lead.Title, status: vars.lead.Status, rating: vars.lead.Rating }]

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Title, AccountId, Department FROM Contact WHERE Id = '#[vars.sfContactId]'

db:select.db:sql: SELECT SF_ID FROM CRM_CONTACTS WHERE SF_ID = :sfId

db:update.db:sql: UPDATE CRM_CONTACTS SET FIRST_NAME = :firstName, LAST_NAME = :lastName, EMAIL = :email, PHONE = :phone, TITLE = :title, ACCOUNT_ID = :accountId, DEPARTMENT = :department, LAST_SYNC = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE SF_ID = :sfId
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ firstName: vars.contact.FirstName, lastName: vars.contact.LastName, email: vars.contact.Email, phone: vars.contact.Phone, title: vars.contact.Title, accountId: vars.contact.AccountId, department: vars.contact.Department, sfId: vars.sfContactId }]

db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO CRM_CONTACTS (SF_ID, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, EMAIL, PHONE, TITLE, ACCOUNT_ID, DEPARTMENT, LAST_SYNC) VALUES (:sfId, :firstName, :lastName, :email, :phone, :title, :accountId, :department, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ sfId: vars.sfContactId, firstName: vars.contact.FirstName, lastName: vars.contact.LastName, email: vars.contact.Email, phone: vars.contact.Phone, title: vars.contact.Title, accountId: vars.contact.AccountId, department: vars.contact.Department }]

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, AccountId, StageName, Amount, Probability, CloseDate, Type FROM Opportunity WHERE Id = '#[vars.sfOppId]'

db:select.db:sql: SELECT SF_ID FROM CRM_OPPORTUNITIES WHERE SF_ID = :sfId

db:update.db:sql: UPDATE CRM_OPPORTUNITIES SET NAME = :name, ACCOUNT_ID = :accountId, STAGE = :stage, AMOUNT = :amount, PROBABILITY = :probability, CLOSE_DATE = :closeDate, TYPE = :accType, LAST_SYNC = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE SF_ID = :sfId
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ name: vars.opp.Name, accountId: vars.opp.AccountId, stage: vars.opp.StageName, amount: vars.opp.Amount default 0, probability: vars.opp.Probability default 0, closeDate: vars.opp.CloseDate, oppType: vars.opp.Type, sfId: vars.sfOppId }]

db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO CRM_OPPORTUNITIES (SF_ID, NAME, ACCOUNT_ID, STAGE, AMOUNT, PROBABILITY, CLOSE_DATE, TYPE, LAST_SYNC) VALUES (:sfId, :name, :accountId, :stage, :amount, :probability, :closeDate, :accType, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ sfId: vars.sfOppId, name: vars.opp.Name, accountId: vars.opp.AccountId, stage: vars.opp.StageName, amount: vars.opp.Amount default 0, probability: vars.opp.Probability default 0, closeDate: vars.opp.CloseDate, oppType: vars.opp.Type }]

salesforce:create.salesforce:records: #[[{ Name: payload.name, Industry: payload.industry, 'Type': payload.'type', BillingCity: payload.city, BillingStateCode: payload.state, BillingCountryCode: 'BR', Legacy_CRM_Id__c: vars.crmId }]]

db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO ALGAR_CRM_NATIVE.ACCOUNTS (CRM_ID, NAME, CNPJ, INDUSTRY, TYPE, CITY, STATE, ANNUAL_REVENUE, SEGMENT, SF_ID, SOURCE_SYSTEM, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, INGESTED_TO_LAKE) VALUES (:crmId, :name, '', :industry, :accType, :city, :state, :revenue, :segment, :sfId, 'CRM_ALGAR', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), FALSE)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ crmId: vars.crmId, name: payload.name default '', industry: payload.industry default '', accType: payload.'type' default '', city: payload.city default '', state: payload.state default '', revenue: payload.annual_revenue default 0, segment: if (payload.'type' == 'Enterprise') 'Large' else 'Medium', sfId: vars.sfAccountId }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "ok", sfId: vars.sfAccountId, crmId: vars.crmId, message: "Account criado no SF + CRM Algar + Snowflake" }

db:select.db:sql: SELECT CRM_ID, NAME, CNPJ, INDUSTRY, TYPE, CITY, STATE, ANNUAL_REVENUE, SEGMENT, SF_ID FROM ALGAR_CRM_NATIVE.ACCOUNTS WHERE INGESTED_TO_LAKE = FALSE
SELECT LEGACY_ID FROM LEGACY_ACCOUNTS WHERE SF_ID = :sfId

db:update.db:sql: UPDATE LEGACY_ACCOUNTS SET NAME = :name, INDUSTRY = :industry, TYPE = :accType, BILLING_CITY = :city, BILLING_STATE = :state, ANNUAL_REVENUE = :revenue, SYNC_STATUS = 'SYNCED', LAST_SYNC = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE SF_ID = :sfId

db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO LEGACY_ACCOUNTS (LEGACY_ID, NAME, CNPJ, INDUSTRY, TYPE, BILLING_CITY, BILLING_STATE, ANNUAL_REVENUE, SEGMENT, LEGACY_SYSTEM, SF_ID, SYNC_STATUS, LAST_SYNC) VALUES (:legacyId, :name, :cnpj, :industry, :accType, :city, :state, :revenue, :segment, 'ALGAR_CRM', :sfId, 'SYNCED', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ legacyId: vars.legacyId, name: vars.rec.NAME, cnpj: vars.rec.CNPJ, industry: vars.rec.INDUSTRY, accType: vars.rec.TYPE, city: vars.rec.CITY, state: vars.rec.STATE, revenue: vars.rec.ANNUAL_REVENUE, segment: vars.rec.SEGMENT, sfId: vars.rec.SF_ID }]

db:update.db:sql: UPDATE ALGAR_CRM_NATIVE.ACCOUNTS SET INGESTED_TO_LAKE = TRUE WHERE CRM_ID = :crmId
